action.reasoning: Observation: New best balanced_accuracy=0.5853 (val_acc=0.571) from iter11's 2-stage ResNet50 (Focal+AdamW5e-4+sqrt-sampler 60ep s1, CE+SGD0.05+mom0.9+count-sampler 30ep s2 on frozen head) + tau=0.75 logit adj; few_shot improved to 0.358, many/medium stable ~0.78/0.60. Curves show solid convergence with stage2 lift. Analysis: cRT-style + focal + logit adj effective for CIFAR100-LT imbalance=100; tau=0.75 helps tail without much head drop; label smoothing and nesterov SGD can further stabilize s2; slight epoch/LR tweaks and tau=1.0 may boost few-shot more (target ~0.59+). No OOM/time issues (~5min/iter, 2.34h/19 iters left). Decision: Update train.py (add label_smoothing=0.1 to s2 CE, nesterov=True, s1=50ep/s2=40ep for balance, proper param freezing+best-save across stages+class_counts in ckpt), set tau=1.0 in predict.py; train then submit_eval immediately for new baseline.
